## What does this PR do?

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New policy source
- [ ] New sector / category
- [ ] UI / frontend improvement
- [ ] Data pipeline update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist
- [ ] Astro build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Python data pipeline runs without errors
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] No console errors in browser
- [ ] New sources added to `feeds.json` (if applicable)
- [ ] Data output validates correctly
